comments:
Animation State Helpers

Ergonomic utilities for managing animated values in Hydrogen apps.
Works with the Cmd-based tick pattern where animation state lives
in app state and ticks are scheduled via `animationFrame`.

## Spring Animation Pattern

```purescript
import Hydrogen.Runtime.Animate as Animate
import Hydrogen.Runtime.Cmd (animationFrame, noCmd, transition)

type State = { position :: Animate.SpringState }

init = { position: Animate.springState springDefault 0.0 }

update = case _ of
  MoveTo target -> 
    transition state 
      { position = Animate.springTo state.position target }
      (animationFrame Tick)
  
  Tick timestamp ->
    let pos = Animate.tickSpring timestamp state.position
    in case Animate.isComplete pos of
      true -> noCmd state { position = pos }
      false -> transition state { position = pos } (animationFrame Tick)

view state =
  E.div_ 
    [ E.style "transform" (translateX (Animate.value state.position)) ]
    []
```

## Tween Animation Pattern

```purescript
type State = { opacity :: Animate.TweenState }

update = case _ of
  FadeIn -> 
    transition state
      { opacity = Animate.tweenTo state.opacity 1.0 300.0 easeOutCubic }
      (animationFrame Tick)
```

declarations.comments:
Spring animation state.

Contains everything needed to evaluate a spring at any timestamp.
Uses "pending start" pattern - startTime of -1.0 means "start on first tick".
declarations.title: SpringState

declarations.comments: Create initial spring state.
declarations.title: springState

declarations.comments:
Start spring animation toward a target value.

Call this when you want to animate to a new value. The spring will
start from its current position. Uses -1.0 as sentinel to indicate
"capture timestamp on first tick".
declarations.title: springTo

declarations.comments:
Advance spring animation to a new timestamp.

Call this on each animation frame to update the current value.
If startTime is -1.0, this tick captures the start time.
declarations.title: tickSpring

declarations.comments:
Tween (duration-based) animation state.
Uses "pending start" pattern - startTime of -1.0 means "start on first tick".
declarations.title: TweenState

declarations.comments: Create initial tween state.
declarations.title: tweenState

declarations.comments:
Start tween animation toward a target value.
Uses -1.0 as sentinel to indicate "capture timestamp on first tick".
declarations.title: tweenTo

declarations.comments:
Advance tween animation to a new timestamp.
If startTime is -1.0, this tick captures the start time.
declarations.title: tickTween

declarations.comments: Get the current value from a spring animation.
declarations.title: springValue

declarations.comments: Check if spring animation is complete.
declarations.title: springComplete

declarations.comments: Reset a spring to a specific value (stops animation).
declarations.title: resetSpring

declarations.comments: Get the current value from a tween animation.
declarations.title: tweenValue

declarations.comments: Check if tween animation is complete.
declarations.title: tweenComplete

declarations.comments: Reset a tween to a specific value (stops animation).
declarations.title: resetTween

declarations.comments: Generate translateX transform style value.
declarations.title: translateX

declarations.comments: Generate translateY transform style value.
declarations.title: translateY

declarations.comments: Generate translate transform style value.
declarations.title: translate

declarations.comments: Generate scale transform style value.
declarations.title: scale

declarations.comments: Generate rotate transform style value (degrees).
declarations.title: rotate

declarations.comments: Generate opacity style value.
declarations.title: opacity

declarations.comments: 2D vector type for position, size, etc.
declarations.title: Vec2

declarations.comments:
Vec2 tween animation state.

Animates two values together with the same timing.
Uses "pending start" pattern - startTime of -1.0 means "start on first tick".
declarations.title: Vec2State

declarations.comments: Create initial Vec2 state.
declarations.title: vec2State

declarations.comments:
Start Vec2 animation toward a target.
Uses -1.0 as sentinel to indicate "capture timestamp on first tick".
declarations.title: vec2To

declarations.comments:
Advance Vec2 animation to a new timestamp.
If startTime is -1.0, this tick captures the start time.
declarations.title: tickVec2

declarations.comments: Get current Vec2 value.
declarations.title: vec2Value

declarations.comments: Check if Vec2 animation is complete.
declarations.title: vec2Complete

declarations.comments: RGB color type for color animation.
declarations.title: RGB

declarations.comments:
Color tween animation state.

Interpolates RGB values with easing.
Uses "pending start" pattern - startTime of -1.0 means "start on first tick".
declarations.title: ColorState

declarations.comments: Create initial color state.
declarations.title: colorState

declarations.comments:
Start color animation toward a target.
Uses -1.0 as sentinel to indicate "capture timestamp on first tick".
declarations.title: colorTo

declarations.comments:
Advance color animation to a new timestamp.
If startTime is -1.0, this tick captures the start time.
declarations.title: tickColor

declarations.comments: Get current color value.
declarations.title: colorValue

declarations.comments: Check if color animation is complete.
declarations.title: colorComplete

declarations.comments: Convert RGB to CSS string.
declarations.title: rgbToLegacyCss

declarations.comments:
Multi-property animator state.

Manages multiple named animations that can be started and ticked together.

```purescript
state = animator
  # withTween "opacity" 0.0
  # withVec2 "position" { x: 0.0, y: 0.0 }
  # withColor "background" { r: 255.0, g: 255.0, b: 255.0 }
```
declarations.title: AnimatorState

declarations.comments: Create an empty animator.
declarations.title: animator

declarations.comments: Add a spring animation.
declarations.title: withSpring

declarations.comments: Add a tween animation.
declarations.title: withTween

declarations.comments: Add a Vec2 animation.
declarations.title: withVec2

declarations.comments: Add a color animation.
declarations.title: withColor

declarations.comments:
Start an animation by name (for tweens).
Timestamp is no longer needed - uses pending start pattern.
declarations.title: startAnimator

declarations.comments: Tick all animations.
declarations.title: tickAnimator

declarations.comments: Check if all animations are complete.
declarations.title: animatorComplete

declarations.comments: Get a spring value by name.
declarations.title: getSpring

declarations.comments: Get a tween value by name.
declarations.title: getTween

declarations.comments: Get a Vec2 value by name.
declarations.title: getVec2

declarations.comments: Get a color value by name.
declarations.title: getColor

declarations.comments: A step in an animation sequence.
declarations.title: SequenceStep

declarations.comments:
Animation sequence state.

Runs animations one after another.
Uses "pending start" pattern - stepStartTime of -1.0 means "start on first tick".
declarations.title: Sequence

declarations.comments: Create a sequence starting from a value.
declarations.title: sequence

declarations.comments: Add a tween step to the sequence.
declarations.title: andThen

declarations.comments: Add a delay step to the sequence.
declarations.title: withDelay

declarations.comments:
Start and tick the sequence.
On first call, marks the sequence as started. Subsequent calls advance it.
declarations.title: tickSequence

declarations.comments: Check if sequence is complete.
declarations.title: sequenceComplete

declarations.comments: Get current sequence value.
declarations.title: sequenceValue

name: Hydrogen.Runtime.Animate
